text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
While I'm out shopping, I see Biko<n>Pegasus
patrolling the district... with<n>Shinko Windy secretly
trailing behind<n>her.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Gah! Ya really wanna know what my<n>plan is? All
right, you've backed me<n>into a corner, so I'll tell
ya!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I'm gonna steal all the glory of<n>Biko's patrol! I
call it... Operation:<n>Justice Extermination!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
She's so full of herself! I asked her<n>to play tag,
but she turned me down to<n>do this stupid patrol!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
I even tried waiting till she was done<n>to ask
again, but she just went back<n>to her dorm...

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
So this is my plan! If anything bad<n>happens, I'll
swoop in and save the<n>day first so she won't be
able to—

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
See you later, granny! Take care to<n>watch your
step now!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Biko! Did you just help<n>someone?! I was
supposed to do that<n>and get all the glory!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
Glory? Oh, are you offering to help?<n>Thanks!
There's always so much<n>happening around here
that I'll take all<n>the help I can get!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
You got it all wrong! I'm not offering<n>to help! Ugh,
why would you even ask<n>me to do something so
draining?
choice_data_list: Come on, help lessen her burden.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text: Huh?! I-I have no idea what you're<n>talking about!

text_block_list.name: Biko Pegasus
text_block_list.text:
The truth? Is there something you<n>want to say to
me? It's okay! Lay it<n>on me!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
Nngh... Nnnngh... No! Just shut up! I<n>hate all of
you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Shinko Windy turns beet-red and<n>blurts out her
words hastily before<n>sprinting away as fast as
she can.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I point out that Biko Pegasus might be<n>declining
her offers to play tag<n>because she's too tired
from her<n>patrols.

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
If I help her, does that mean she'll<n>still have
enough energy to play tag<n>with me after she's
done?!

text_block_list.name: Shinko Windy
text_block_list.text:
F-fine! I'll help out! You'd better be<n>grateful,
Biko!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
So the pair patrol together... and peace<n>once
again prevails in the shopping<n>district.
